---
title: "Yan Mei"
sortby: "7"
subtitle: "Doctoral Researcher"
image: yan.jpg
started: "2026"
interests: ""
toc: false
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../people.html">People</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active">PhD Students</li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}
:::

## Background

Yan Mei is a doctoral researcher in the CorMic graduate school, co-supervised with Prof. Luca Ghiringhelli (KIT).
